users.removeConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete {username} and all of their data. They will lose access immediately.

invitations.revokeConfirmDesc: This invitation link will no longer work.
invitations.notePlaceholder: e.g. John Smith, expires after camp

settings.llmDesc: Configure the LLM presets used across this instance. The first preset is the default.
settings.modelDefaultHint: Default model, used when a user hasn't picked one. Add it to the selectable models below to attach body params.
settings.apiKeySet: Key configured — enter a new value to replace it
settings.testNoBaseUrl: Add a preset first before testing
settings.extraHeadersDesc: Added to every outbound LLM request — e.g. a provider's zero-data-retention header.
settings.modelsDesc: The presets users can choose from — e.g. Anthropic, Mistral. The first preset is the instance default. Each carries its own base URL, model, key, headers and body params. Body values are read as JSON where possible.
settings.structuredOutputsDesc: Send a strict JSON schema so plan/workout generation conforms exactly. Leave on unless this provider rejects it.
settings.analysisContextDesc: Optional coaching context injected into every activity analysis for this instance. Describe the sport, training philosophy, or any standing instructions for the AI coach.
settings.analysisContextPlaceholder: e.g. This is an elite road cycling team. Prioritise power-based metrics and threshold training. Responses should be concise and data-driven.
settings.adminContactDesc: Shown to users on the password-reset screen. Leave blank to hide it.
settings.requiresSubscriptionDesc: When on, only users with AI access (or their own AI model via BYOK) can use this instance’s AI features.
settings.requiresSubscriptionWarning: Users without AI access or their own AI model will be blocked from AI features until you grant them access.

usage.title: LLM usage
usage.desc: Token usage for instance-paid AI calls. Calls made through users’ own AI models (BYOK) are not counted.
